query:
INSERT INTO expenses.bank_connections (
            id,
            user_id,
            provider,
            provider_account_id,
            connection_label,
            connection_status,
            oauth_state,
            oauth_state_expires_at,
            scopes,
            last_sync_status,
            last_sync_created_count,
            last_sync_updated_count,
            last_sync_duplicate_count,
            created_at,
            updated_at
        )
        VALUES (
            $1, $2, $3, $4, $5, 'pending', $6, $7, $8, 'never', 0, 0, 0, now(), now()
        )
